case_title: MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP VS CUEVA MARIA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $525.69 FILED BY MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP AS TO DEFENDANT CUEVA MARIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-08-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CUEVA MARIA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CUEVA MARIA $525.69 PRINCIPAL, $57.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $582.69 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT CUEVA MARIA HEARING SET FOR NOV-15-1993 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01
DO NOT ISSUE WRTS, ABSTRACT ETC. DEF FILE FOR TIME PAYMENT.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS OF NOV-15-1993, GRANTED
PETITION OF JUDGMENT CREDITOR TO SET ASIDE TERMS FOR PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP
ORDER TO SET ASIDE TERMS FILED BY PLAINTIFF MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CUEVA MARIA
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT CUEVA MARIA
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CUEVA MARIA
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $370.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $99.03 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT CUEVA MARIA
